Excellent and courteous staff
Size of the room  Nice room however a bit small for a double bedroom
Unclean 4 starts hotel should be main less 4   Nothing waist of money
The staff was really nice and helpful always with kindness and a smile The hotel is cosy very well located and confortable
Nothing it was great   Very clean great location with a room view of the eifall tower close to a metro station with access to the whole city Not much noise from outside and friendly staff

The rooms facing the Eiffel were very small compared to the attic rooms The room service had a weird habit of unlocking and entering the room for cleaning This was irrespective of the fact if we are sleeping or bathing inside the room This happened all 2 days of our stay   The Non Eiffel rooms are very spacious with huge bathrooms Every room had a Samsung phone provided by the hotel with data connection We took the phone for our parisian tour and it was big help as we could use google maps The hotel is 200 M from 2 metro stations and just 1 stop from the Eiffel Great Location with MC Donald Monoprix and numerous restaurants around

The gym in my opinion wasn t really a gym all it had was a tredmill and weight machine So a little disappointed with that   Staff were very friendly and acomadating The view of the Effiel tower from our room was amazing And was only a 10 15 minute walk to the Effiel tower itself

The beds are super comfy and the rooms are extremely clean The absolute best feature of this hotel is its staff They were all so helpful and courteous They made our stay great and I am sold This is the hotel for me whenever I am in town

There was nowhere available for us to have a shower after we checked out It was a very warm day after sightseeing it would have been nice to have a shower before leaving for the train station   Lovely decor and great shower

The site did not have an iron to borrow   Staff was very welcoming and helpful Spoke English and recommended restaurants nearby We were able to get a nice view of the Eiffel Tower from our bed at a reasonable price Hotel was walking distance from Eiffel Tower Front Desk was even able to hold our luggge after checkout while we did some final exploring before our flight home

We LOVED it here We got a room with the view of the Eiffel Tower and it was dreamy to wake up and see that each morning The location is just a short walk from the Metro which is insanely easy to use We were worried it would be confusing but it was great

Nothing to fault but we didn t use any faculties as ate and drank out of the hotel We parked at the hotel which was unique as they had a lift you drove into   We booked a room with a view of the effiel tower and boy it did not disappoint it was definitely worth the extra money

Nothing  We were upgraded to the room on the top floor with an amazing view of the Eiffel Tower it was very romantic and very quiet which was lovely there was a market outside on Wednesday morning where we got some baguettes and breakfast it was very cultural and interesting walking to the Eiffel Tower in the evening was only a 15 minute walk and it was very magical and easy to get back to the hotel the staff were very helpful and spoke very good English as well as this metro access was great we could get around the city no problem I would definitely recommend getting a room on the top floor

I could only find two faults within my stay The view from the hotel rooms were not as good as anticipated only getting a glimpse of the top The rooms were quite small looked much larger in the pictures   Excellent little hotel Lovely decor great location only 10 minutes walk from the Eiffel Tower The staff were excellent very polite and brilliant service Hotel was accomadating and flexible with check in times
I paid for a room with an Eiffel Tower view and all I got was a view of the tip of the tower Total lie The room and hallway smelled bad the Room was so small I couldn t turn around  Close to metro

the coffee machine didnt work in the room the noice from the train station the pice for the two night was not worth it the room service came from the restaurant teo doors down and the plates were not taken away from the room but the towels were replaced   the staff where friendly The room was nice with the eiffel tower view

Shower drainage wasn t great   View of the Eiffel Tower was awesome Position close to metro meant it was easy and cheap to get around with Eiffel Tower within 10min walk central location Markets across the road were nice Room was very well sound proofed Rooms looked recently refurbished and were very nice Staff very friendly and helpful Good water pressure

we liked the complete hotel and all of its facilities Especially the generosity and proficiency of the Team of Staff members  We went there during our European tour for two days from England via the train to a very warm welcome and a fantastic bottle of champagne in our room I asked for a room overlooking the Eiffel Tower and this was accommodated We sat and drank our bottle overlooking this most fantastic sight We must thank the hotel for their efficiency and the assistance of their Team Members for the most fantastic stay

If I had to nitpick maybe the rooms could be a little bigger but this is just a tiny thing that I really didn t even care about Great stay  The location was EXCELLENT It it within walking distance of the Eiffel Tower and just a short walk to the metro We were able to go everywhere we wanted to go in hardly any time at all There are plenty of shops within very close walking distance and delicious restaurants We really enjoyed our stay in Paris because it was so easy to get around

Small rooms hight price for a very average service and quality of accomodation   In general the hotel was OK The location is of course very good if you want to reach the city center on foot The view from the rooms is directly at the road and metro trains which is not so attractive The only rooms with a nice view are on the top of the building but they cost even more The hotel is clean and modern but the rooms are so small that we could hardly close the door of a bathroom being inside In general I felt that I paid too much for what was offered
Hotel reception under staffed Front desk is usually empty and had to wait 15 mins to jus get our bags out  Hotel location was ideal and the room was cozy
Wifi was not stable Except that nothing more to complain about Small but very clean   Very clean bed Clean and quiet neighborhood I didn t eat breakfast in Hotel

I didn t like that the room was stifling hot and the air conditioner was not turned on in the room We had to ask the front desk staff to turn on the unit It was very disappointing that there was not an independent thermostat within the room The room was also dated and small   The front desk staff were extremely helpful and nice
Nine  Bed comfortable toiletries Le Occitane bathroom very modern and clear spacious room has Nespresso soundproof quiet environment walking distance to Eiffel Tower
Great location easy walking distance to major attractions and an amazing selection of food and drink nearby The local market on Sunday was an added bonus
Bed was uncomfortable  The view from the room is fantastic and the facilities are great but you do need to stay more than one night to enjoy using them
There s no desk in the room there is a table so if you need to work a lot from behind a desk in the hotel it can be inconvenient   Clean modern no nonsense hotel with nice designer rooms

Room was compact but well arranged bathroom modern bed comfortable The only thing was that there is no real closet They have an area in the room for hanging clothing and there are drawers but space is limited All in all the positive things about this hotel very much outweigh the small inconvenience of the closet space We would definitely stay here again   The hotel was within easy walking distance from the Eiffel Tower which we had a beautiful view of from our hotel room the metro numerous cafes and a small dept store up the block which had a wonderful bakery inexpensive baguettes croissants etc all within a short walking distance EVERYONE of the staff members were as helpful as possible I was able to practice my French and the staff was so helpful in indicating for us how to get to the various locations we wanted to travel to by metro Location of hotel was very centrally located All the hop on hop off buses were only a few blocks walk by the Eiffel Tower Best part of the Hotel experience was the wonderful view of the Eiffel Tower both during the day and the beautiful lights of the tower in the evening I would highly recommend if you stay here to splurge and get a room with a view

Everything was excellent except after telling us there would be a phone for us to use for messaging looking up places of interest etc it was removed from our room after first night and not returned We were told it was for updating but that wouldn t take 4 days Would have preferred for it not to be offered But that was the only disappointment A fridge would have been handy   The friendliness of all the staff They went out of their way to assist The hotel was so perfect for us we feel Lucky to have found it
More information on excursions if I m being picky can t really fault the hotel for anything   The location and view was very good The phone we were given for our stay was very useful and a great idea

nothing  Everything about this property was great I booked a room with a view of the Eiffel tower and got exactly that A mobile was provided free for use during our stay which was invaluable Will be back

The breakfast was basic and too expensive for what was offered compared with other similar hotels in Paris The bar was basic and did not offer any draft beer   A good cup of coffee was prepared individually by order at breakfast time The bedroom was large for Paris and the bedroom was very comfortable

Hard to pick anything out if I was being really picky all I d say is instructions as to how to use the coffee machine Ive never used one before so that s my own fault and maybe a mini fridge as we bought our own milk tea and sugar and ended up throwing away the milk   The most comfortable bed I have ever stayed in the views were amazing and breakfast in bed made the trip extra special
No mini fridge in room to keep drink foods cold No ironing board facilities in room Don t think you should have to pay for laundry services  Location staff members rooms overall service excellent

If I was really fussy I d say the lack of a fridge mini bar was the only thing I missed Nothing at all to complain about   Just a ten minute walk from the Eiffel tower and with views of the tower itself from the room this hotel was an excellent choice Loved the decor very nice staff comfortable quiet despite the metro running outside Great location for walking to cafes and restaurants near many sights and with two metro lines running outside Hope to come back to Paris again soon and Le Parisis will be my first choice

Nothing in the Hotel but conned by the Taxi so watch out   Location was very good and there was even a twice a week market outside the door As I was on the 5th floor the noise of the market didn t impact and I could view the Eiffel Tower which I had paid to see The friends I was meeting stayed in a more expense Hotel but it was too busy and nothing in the room was working and they had no view even though they were very close to the Eiffel Tower A good smaller 4 deserved rating

The front desk staff who checked us in was not friendly and talked to us like we were his student The reservation was a junior suite but it was actually a double bed plus a sofa bed in the double bed room A suite is misleading In addition there were only two glasses for brushing teeth in the bathroom and two glasses for drinking water while we were a group of three I called the front desk and the same staff answered the phone He insisted that there were no glasses in the bathroom and even there were the hotel would not provide an extra glass for brushing teeth to us I requested him to come to the room to show him what glasses in the bathroom I was referring to and he agreed So I then put down the phone without saying another sentence He came to the room after 15 mins with one glass for drinking water He then insisted that the hotel would not provide the 3rd glass in the bathroom after I showed him that there were two glasses in the bathroom I was so shocked at his answer and I did not want to argue further with him Before I closed the door he turned around and said to me Next time when you finish talking on the phone you should say goodbye before putting down the phone At first I did not understand what he meant but then I realised that he actually complained about me putting down the phone without saying goodbye How ridiculous is that I think he forgot that I was the guest and he was the staff I did make a complaint when I checked out and the female manager did apologise to me However this really affected our mood staying in this hotel   Location is excellent 1 min s walk to the Metro and a lot of restaurants and stores around

Nothing   The receptionists were particularly welcoming and spoke English which was good for those of us using rusty French The bedroom had a lovely view of the Eiffel tower and had beautiful toilietries provided So close to the metro and spoilt for choice on where to eat and drink

Maybe I didn t like that Eiffel Tower view I saw the tower from my room but I expected more with the price that I gave   The room was very clean and comfortable The Staff was very friendly they got 5 stars from me It s a quiet and elegant place The hotel is near Eifel Tower about 5 10 minutes walk Maybe I didn t like that Eiffel Tower view I saw the tower from my room but I expected more with the price that I gave

Initially we thought that the breakfast was included in the price of the room but upon checking out we were informed that we had to pay Still it was worth it   The staff at this location were very friendly helpful and professional Breakfast was great The bed very comfortable and a lovely bathroom There are many restaurants bars and shops in the neighbourhood which we enjoyed tremendously It is about 10 to 12 minute walk to the Eiffel Tower and about the same to the nearest stop for the Hop on Hop off bus The Metro station is a block away which made it easy and convenient when going sight seeing and when arriving from the airport For the price we paid it was excellent value and I would readily recommend it

Breakfast 17 each Showers wouldn t stop leaking had to use most of our towels to stop it from going into the bedroom no choice on pillows I didn t sleep well only had really soft Superking bed was really two singles pushed together You are not guaranteed a room with a city or eiffel tower view Be prepared to spend a lot of money here 4 for a bottle of water Reception wanted to charge me extra 10 just because I asked him if he could phone me a taxi We asked for a wake up call and didn t feel like we got one no alarm clocks in the room almost missed our flight if it wasn t for Uber Bring lots of Euro keep quite a bit on your bank card to book Ubers cheaper and have enough to pay for a velib bike fine Never say yes to a looky looky man and don t ask why if you are told no You should have a pleasant stay   Peaceful and luxurious feel Very helpful staff Has sauna and executive option Climate controlled room with electric shutter and medium firmness bed ensured a great nights sleep for my husband Lovely lady receptionist did everything she could and even upgraded us to privilege for free Location is 20mins walk from Eiffel tower and there are lots of cute cafes to have breakfast or a beer in

We had a fantastic weekend at the Hotel Parisis the staff were supurb right from arrival and provided everything we could have required the room was modern clean tidy and had an excellent view of the Eiffel Tower The hotel is also fantastically located within walking distance of the Eiffel Tower and also the Metro which made exploring paris very easy We would highly recommend

The staff in the hotel went out of their way to help us Our room was ready early so we could go in and freshen up before exploring They even let us borrow an adapter plug when we realised we bought the wrong one The hotel was in a great location too only a 15 minute slow walk from the Eiffel Tower The bars and restaurants around the hotel were great too The room was clean and comfortable with a great shower and an amazing big window with a view of the Eiffel Tower Worth every penny and would love to return

The room is smaller than I thought it would be but their cute chic design made up for the lack of space  I have to say that I am impressed with this hotel Having heard rumors about how the hotel staff in Paris can be rude I came there with low expectations but the staff was really nice just the right amount of professionalism and friendliness Our room was clean and it looked fresh and new we also had a room upgrade where we could see a little bit of the Eiffel Tower The breakfast was good too for just 17 it was a treat I love that every room has their own samsung phone with 4g that you can take anywhere with you it was really helpful The Eiffel Tower is about 1 3 kms from the hotel so you can walk or take a taxi for 7
The phone they gave us with data was so helpful and helped us to get around the city There we great restaurants cafes and shopping walking distance The metro is a very close walk as well

The staff seemed a bit snooty about having a young man in a hoodie bringing McDonalds through their lobby I think they expected more upper class guests   The view of the Eiffel Tower from the window was great The rooms were very attractive and comfortable Amazing location

Great location Very central Staff were excellent Didn t try the breakfast Didn t look to impressive for the price and there were many other places to eat Really enjoyed the proximity to the Metro was very easy to get to any our meeting places for various tours

Staff very friendly room was very clean and the bed VERY comfy We also had a great view of the Eiffel Tower which was great we looked forward to watching the lights flashing from the comfort of our hotel room

Nothing  Rooms were really comfortable especially the beds and really big for Paris bathroom was so clean shower amazing and with great toiletries the reception were so friendly and helpful with directions The bar area was really nice and drinks reasonably priced I would definitely recommend and would return as the hotel was situated close to the Eifel tower with lots of lovely restaurants and cafe s nearby and a tube very close A great choice couldn t ask for a better hotel

At the check in the manager wrote down my CVC code on the pretence they need to check me Later I realized they can t do that won t stay at this hotel again have to reissue card now Really disappointing   Bed was comfortable bathroom was clean

Excellent accommodations Hotel was new and modern Room exceeded my expectations in size and comfort Bathroom was modern with an amazing shower Great location Spectacular view of the Eiffel tower and within 4 min walk to metro

Breakfast was very expensive 17 Hotel locked itself up at night and one night we were unable to get in for 30 minutes   Decent location A few minutes walk to the tower Quite a longer walk to other attractions Free cell phone to take and use while in Paris Amazing bathroom Elevated train line runs right in front but it has rubber wheels and is hardly noticeable Hundreds of cafes nearby

Paris is an expensive city so all rooms in any hotel are expensive   Staff exceptionally friendly and committed to providing extra service The room with a view of the Eiffel tower is amazing Very comfortable bed great bathroom which looks like it was new renovated with a good sized walk in shower The biggest room I have had in Paris Lovely area to sit and have a drink and believe that this is where breakfast is served Many restaurants nearby
Nothing its all good   Its very luxurious and I LOVED the shower Room Service are great and the extra touch of an additional phone to take with you where ever you go is a nice touch

Only issue was that room had no view window and instead had a large skylight with excellent shade system   Reasonably priced plentiful breakfast Staff were superb especially reception Room very updated and large by European standards Interesting smartphone offered that is preloaded with info about attractions transportation and more but we never inquired as to the cost Taxis and Uber were pretty available

Good location The Eiffel Tower was a 10 minute walk The beds were super comfy and had two very good nights sleep The room was bigger than I expected The large shower was great with L Occitane toiletries

I can t think of a thing   Jean Pierre immediately made us feel more than welcome He is extremely patient and knowledgeable The woman running the breakfast I am sorry I do not know her name was lovely and the breakfast wonderful

Great hospitality great staff great location affordable price perfect place to stay I stayed there with my partner for 3 nights we ll come back definitely Even a room at lower story had the Effel Tower view
Temperature in the room was very odd I was hot and cold but r wasn t tooo bad I still very much enjoyed the stay  Everything The stafff the room the decor

I wish the toilet space wasn t so small it did make me feel a bit claustrophobic I wish there were a few more English speaking channels other than the news   Le Parisis Hotel is a beautiful hotel located in quite a central location Very close to the metro station only 10 minutes from the Eiffel Tower and heaps of restaurants surrounding it It s not too far from the Arc de Triomphe or the Champs Elysees about a 30 minute walk but it takes you through some beautiful views of Paris If safety is a concern we felt very safe in the area We walked to the Eiffel Tower around midnight and came back around 2 30 but the area was still very lively with lots of people walking around The staff are extremely friendly accomodating We were always greeted with a smile and always asked about our day and what we planned to do for the day We were allowed to check in at 12 because our room was ready at no extra cost which was a very nice touch considering we d been in Paris since 9am All in all it was an amazing stay and I would definitely recommend it stay there again

The stay had been going pretty well We decided to go to Disneyland on one of the first days we got to Paris On our last day in the hotel the cleaners TOOK the presents souvenirs that we both from Disneyland We advise the reception about this straight away and the said they would ask the cleaner about it the next day and send me an email as we were leaving a few hours later I waited 3 days to hear something back from the hotel and received nothing I then took it upon myself to email them and they replied saying there is nothing they can do and that I have no proof they took anything I did not find this an acceptable or professional response I replied to their email and have still yet to hear back from them two weeks later I would not recommend this hotel as I find it uncomfortable to think that someone was going through my things took something that wasn t there s and to be told I ve no proof Will definitely not be going back
There should be more than one English speaking television channel  The hotel was very small but vey nice The underground transport system in Paris is amazing
Very few English channels on the tv considering they target the UKI market for reservations Curtains in the room don t close very well  Great staff clean fantastic location very comfy bed and room

We were in a very small loft converted room Toilet was tiny size of a cupboard and the door just about opened without touching the edge of the toilet so had to leave door open due to feeling claustrophobic We were given dressing gowns on our first night which were then taken away and not replaced by the cleaner   The bed was big clean and comfortable The bathroom was big toiletries were good quality A hotel mobile was given with access to internet around Paris
The friendliness of the staff and how helpful they were The location is just a short walk to the Eiffel Tower and has great shopping and eating nearby

Nothing   Everything From the moment we stepped inside and were greeted for the checkin to the moment we departed and were able to leave our luggage for 7 hours before our train back to London The room was clean quiet airy had very comfortable beds The best surprise for us was the fact that the hotel provided us with a mobile phone in the room that we were able to take with us during our visit It had all the best travel apps on it and we had an unlimited data and minute plan location location location Short walk to the Eiffel Tower Very short walk to the tube station Loved our stay at the Le Parisis and we will definitely book this again when we are next in Paris

We arrived in Paris quite early due to the time of our Eurostar and wasn t able to check in until 2pm I know there are check in times it would have been nice if we could have settled into our rooms earlier We also didn t have a Samsung phone in the room like they said we would have  The room was a really good size and the specification of the furnishings and bathroom etc was lovely

Very good amenities two metro stations nearby Eiffel Tower and Seine banks are reachable by feet within a few minutes Good restaurants and bars around Very quiet room although it was directly beneath the elevator
From the start of our stay all our wishes were fulfilled with ease and reliability The staff in the hotel is very welcoming and friendly The hotel room with view of the Eiffel Tower was amazing

What I didn t like was that we were not told that breakfast was not included in our price when we booked it and the food provided was really not up to par They had no umbrellas if it was raining outside   I liked that it was in close proximity of alot of stores and restuarants It was clean staff was very attentive Hotel was very quiet
We booked a twin room but they only provided a double I had also emailed prior and asked that they ensured it was a twin and they said it wouldn t be a problem But then they still gave us a double

The desk receptionists The staff lacked courtesy most of the time I paid premium for a room with a view and since it was a 4 star hotel I was expecting a 4 star service I wasn t offered the bathrobe for the Sauna I was ignored when I asked for a refill for the coffee machine The staff can be more friendly I wasn t expecting the snobbery   The Eiffel tower view and the Nespresso machine in the room The room was comfortable and clean

A male staff member was rude the room is small you can here water running when neighbors take their shower  The property is very well organized with new facilities I really liked the fact that they give a cell phone with a 4g connection The amenities they put are of a great value and quality and the shower is great after a long day of walk

Maybe the price as it s more to just a boutique hotel there are market wet dry in front of the hotel cause smelly air   Location very near to the underground train Hotel facilities is good Staff are friendly

Evening reception continuously on smoking brakes in front of the main door did not advise that on a Sunday they don t provide room service except for sandwich  The bed was very confortare and the place was extremely clean
The hair dryer wasn t working they could have replaced it but I didn t ask for another one   The location was great The staff are super friendly I liked the breakfast

Nothing   Everything about the property was perfect Location Value Service Second time staying here and was just as pleased as the last visit Would suggest people to eat out for breakfast as their are a lot of cafes and restaurants within 5mins walking distance
Free breakfast  Great location for sights and ease of travel Rooms slightly small but that s expected for central paris 10 euros a drink at the bar is a down side as well

We felt that 17 each for breakfast was a bit steep given the limited choices but what was there was lovely   The location of the hotel was great short walks everywhere and the metro just outside made going further afield easier

Breakfast was not included in my booking but when we went to have breakfast it wasnt worth it however the location means you have many options to choose to have breakfast from instead   Great location great rooms great service Worth every penny

Nothing   I cannot recommend this hotel highly enough The staff could not be more helpful and our room provided stunning views of the Eiffel Tower The location was great and directly opposite the metro which was ideal for accessing all major tourist attractions Our room was beautifully decorated and immaculately clean The perfect choice to celebrate my 21st birthday a big thank you to the staff for helping to make it so special

rooms too hot but it took us a while to understand the automatic window openers   very calm although close to the center very close to metrostations We visited all spots in Paris by metro nice and friendly personnel

Absolutely nothing couldn t fault it at all   Absolutely loved staying here The staff were so welcoming warm and friendly They couldn t do more for us we arrived early so they stored our luggage whilst we went to do some sight seeing Later when we went to dinner they took the time to ask how we found our room and if we needed anything The room couldn t have been better The view of the Eiffel Tower was amazing And getting to lie in bed and watch the lights twinkle away honestly made our stay So special and romantic The location of the hotel couldn t have been better 2 metro stops only a few minutes walk away and the Eiffel Tower only took us 10 mins I couldn t recommend this hotel enough so much so that they day after we got home I booked up again for my 30th birthday in September Can t wait
Breakfast was a little too expensive   Easy to get in and out of central Paris and getting to and from Gard du Nord also really simple All in all a lovely hotel lovely staff Great view too

Hotel breakfast was slightly expensive but there were a ton of options in the Grenelle neighborhood right outside the front door   Staff was extremely pleasant and attentive The view from the room was top notch We will definitely return to Le Parisis the next time we visit Paris
Nothing  Excellent hotel close to lots of places to eat Staff we always polite and attentitive including the ladies that serviced the rooms And close to metro station which we used everyday

Being picky would have been nice to have an iron and board in the room this was provided when asked for however so not really an issue Breakfast teabags instead of earl grey that s about it  Great view of the Eiffel Tower from the room no street or metro noise when window closed despite it being so near Comfortable and enjoyable experience
Very poor wifi signal and soundproof isn t that great as you are informed whenever a metro is getting close   Location is good and staff are friendly and helpful

I wish there was a restaurant in the hotel that would offer dinner because it s pretty hard to find a good place for having dinner   The room was really nice and comfy just as pictured The staff was friendly and helpful I really enjoyed the hotel and I would definitely visit it again
The staff is amazing and so friendly Felt like being apart of a family The property is centrally located and easily accessable Very nice and chic hotel

No view of the Eiffel Tower not much options for parking   Typical boutique hotels with modern chic design The facilities were clean good location and friendly staff Our rooms were quiet with lots of complementary coffee and tea

I hated the fact when someone took the stairs it moved the front door so I felt that someone was coming in the room I also noticed that anyone can enter the main hotel reception and access upstairs with security The reception is most times at night unattended and you don t need a key passcode to activate the lift For a 4 star hotel this is needed It made me feel unstable   I stayed at room 56 and I loved it The space of the room gave an apartment feel and the bed and shower was amazing I also loved the window Location is excellent

The bed was comfortable and the staff was very helpful The lady at the front desk on our first night went out of her way to help me print our tickets to Disneyland for use the next day when I had forgotten to print them prior to our trip

Nothing to fault Everything was suberb   The hotel could have not been better very clean and brilliant location The reception staff went above and beyond to make our stay extra special Hamid and Victoria were both wonderful 5 service to them We will all definitely be coming back to the hotel xx

A little pricy but I guess it s normal for the Paris area  We had a window view of the top of the Eiffel Tower so that was beautiful to wake up to At first glance the hotel doesn t seem fancy at all but it very nice and modern on the inside

Nothing bad comes to mind   The location is everything walking distance from the tower right in front of the subway station and close to bars and restaurants The bed is very comfy and the room was perfectly clean
Too strong hotel perfume used in the rooms Nice but too strong  Everything Nice atmosphere Quite Great location Friendly staff The view on Eiffel Tower

We came at the noon time when all rooms are not ready yet We asked a favor to put us at a higher floor When we back to the hotle again still 2nd floor left for us What a disappointed moment   It s really about 10 minuts by walking after get out of subway The room is so clean and comfortable Really can see the Eiffel Tower even we are located the 2nd floor Nice staff who helps us to keep those luggages

The staff on the front desk were fantastic Friendly helpful professional and spoke perfect English The view of the Eiffel Tower sparkling at night was so special Great location too near two tube stops and in walking distance of Eiffel Tower

We chose this hotel because of the services advertised and expected at a 4 hotel only to be left disappointed when there in fact was no room service and the bar didn t open for the entire weekend stay   The Hotel was lovely very clean with a great location

Near active train tracks but with the windows closed it shielded the noise Breakfast was not included as I was told only those who book directly get that not through booking com and the price for a breakfast was expensive for mediocre food   The beds were extremely comfortable shower large with rainfall showerhead view of Eiffel tower not too far away
French is not my language so I didn t read a card to ask to clean the room so they didn t clean   I loved the bathroom There is a Pizzerie next to the Hotel deliciuous
My room Was super low and everybody could see us if we leave the windows open and I asked before the booking to have a room with the view how I paid for it and I didn t have any view

I didn t like when we had to pack and leave   Welcoming ambience Very helpful reception Delicious breakfast with an open air feel dining area Parking facility was a big plus and very secure Few spaces so reserve a must Oh the view of the Eiffel Tower from our room was beautiful Quiet room thanks to the sound insulated windows yet if you like they open

There was a strong perfume smell that we didn t like in our room but others may   View of the Eiffel Tower at first it doesn t look great as is only the top of it but at night it s magical just looking out the window seeing the main attraction to Paris light up Room is nice comfy bed great shower Walking distance to Eiffel Tower

Breakfast was a little pricey so we ate elsewhere Rooms should have ice bucket   We were greeted with a smile and a lil humor The room was modern and very clean Fresh crisp apples and water awaited us in the room We booked the room with an Eiffel Tower view AMAZING

Staff could have been a little more helpful pre arrival Asked for a cot for another room in our party and was told it would depend on availability when we arrived It was provided and staff were very helpful while there but not the best impression before the trip   Very comfy rooms and nice showers
Knowledge of the ingredients in the food on the room service needs to be improved   The room was beautiful the bed very comfy and the shower was huge

The staff member in the morning did not seem very helpful when we asked him if he could call a cab We ended up taking care of it ourselves instead   We spent the night here after our civil wedding The room had an incredible view of the Tour Eiffel and the metro line 6 The rooms are modern but chic The breakfast was simple but good I would definitely stay here again
The floor of the shower was as slick as ice I had to put a towel on it so I didn t slip and fall Quite dangerous   The staff was outstanding Everyone was friendly helpful and treated us like family

I did not like that the hotel was short of staff in the evening By short I mean there was no one except one person at the reception and that was it so for everything I wanted I had to go downstairs Room was very small for a family of 3 there was no space to move in the room no place for luggage at all no tissues were provided to us in the room There were stains on the carpet The room was cleaned everytime we went out but the cleanliness went down as the day passes by we were in the hotel for 5 days   I loved where the hotel was located it was at walkable distance to the Eiffel Tower and train station was just outside the hotel

The man in the reception the day we arrived wasn t very polite only that man all the others were very friendly Also there should be a little fridge in the rooms   Good hotel very clean and in a good location
From your advert was under the impression we would see all the tower but wonderful as it was we could only see about two thirds   The cleanliness comfort staff were all first class

Money exchange facilities far few so do it at the airport   The front desk staff was great Hotel was compact but most all of them are but it had all the amenities you need and was very modern Loved being walking distance to Eifel tower and most of the famous landmarks and the metro 2blocks down was the best Also a fresh food market right across the street mmmm I ll be back

The blow dryer didn t work   A very nice room with a fantastic view of the Eiffel Towe The staff was exceptionally helpful and friendly The room was very quiet and we had a comfortable night There is fresh fruit in the room as well as a coffee maker and teapot We will definitely recommend this place to our friends

Great hotel in a fabulous location for Paris site seeing parks and restaurants The rooms are modern comfortable and well appointed The staff are friendly and helpful The bar is a lovely oasis Excellent restaurants are a short walk away across the Champ de Mars Great transport connections are really close This is my new favourite Paris hotel
Staff fantastic made us feel extremely welcome everything was perfect modern and clean hotel situated minutes from everything Couldn t ask for a better honeymoon destination
Not enough electrical outlets  The location is very close to Eiffel Tower We can see it from the room The breakfast was very good and everyone was very helpful

What let the hotel down was although the bedroom and bathroom was very attractive it had a basic feel Open wardrobe had to ask for ironing board and iron no black tea or milk but strangely two green apples and two bottles of water Also no guest book on services For 270 a night felt it was overpriced   Friendly staff Good position close to Eiffel Tower and two metro stations Front rooms on floor five and six have Eiffel Tower views beautiful bar lounge Liked the Nespresso machine Comfortable bed great shower There was a good value room service menu although we didn t use it as plenty of caf s nearby

Did not realise there was a view of the train line as well   Very comfortable bed Handy location although we were there on the night of soccer semi final and the streets were awash with revellers Fortunately the windows are double glazed

i have booked a room with Eiffel Tower view but unfortunately got only to see the tip of Eiffel Tower as my room was facing the train station and other buildings   Great beds location not a touristy area at all and breakfast area

Sorry I really can t think of anything   We had a partial view of the Eiffel tower and a beautiful room There was a bit of a problem with the plumbing initially but the staff was great about dealing with it The hotel staff esp Hamid Yves and Dimitri were wonderfully kind and helpful and made us feel at home And the breakfast and where it was served was absolutely the best We had a great stay and will certainly return one day

The first night our shower would not get hot Upon calling to complain they said they would fix it tomorrow The next day the host barged into our room after knocking with a secondary person without introducing her They then disrespectfully stood on a towel in our bathroom and left in on the floor after judging the fact that we were not out exploring at noon Felt very disrespectful and unprofessional He then told me to repack my stuff and meet him downstairs so he can give us a room in a few hours It was absurd I went down to complain and finally there was some accomodation

Great interior lovely and helpful staff especial at check in near by shopping area and landmark I picked Effel tower view the hotel don t have full view but the metro noise killed it so better the park if you wanna have good sleep

The front staff who I think was manager did not help us with luggage It was three adults with a 2 year old Also we had two rooms with Eiffel Tower view Only one room was ready The other wasn t ready until 530 pm I think their are understaffed with their cleaning crew We had to ask for compensation for one room not ready They gave us a free drink Thank god we only stayed one night We were on the fourth floor with view of only half of Eiffel Tower By their advertisement it showed a better view of the Eiffel Tower which I thought I paid for There is a fifth and sixth floor which probably had a better view I did ask for a late check out for one of the rooms but was told no Even though they advertise that check in is 2 pm We did not get one of our rooms until 530 pm so I would think we could of had late check out I would not stay there again Wasn t what the pictures show of the Eiffel Tower   The staff for the morning breakfast were very nice She was polite

No room Service after 22 00  Very helpful staff beautiful room nice location and a great view if you are looking for the stunning view but don t feel like paying above 300 euros per night this is the place to go

The hotel seems to be better in picture In reality the room was too claustrophobic There was no staff to help us with the luggage We had to drag the heavy luggage ourselves Reception was a podium with a single person with laptop attending the guests Me n my daughter felt disgusting with the hospitality after such a long journey from India We recommend to go with branded hotel chains

One of the staff was not really on the ball He forgot to make an important call for us and he wasn t very attentive The rest of the staff were great   The bed was fabulous I hated to leave it The location was perfect as we mainly had plans for the Eiffel Tower and the Seine There were plenty of restaurants near by

had to wait for person at front desk only one person often dealing with more than one set of customers at a time  bathroom up to date and very clean excellent location close to transit trains and view of tower

The facility was beautiful and we ll maintained The staff was helpful The room was perfect and had a wonderful view of the Eiffel Tower Breakfast was wonderful and had a nice variety There is a sauna downstairs as well

Position of hotel was excellent close enough to Eiffel Tower and yards to the Metro for further excursions View from our bedroom to Eiffel Tower was excellent The amenities around the hotel and surround were fantastic

I paid extra for an eiffel tower view as it was my boyfriends 30th birthday but the view was shocking Nothing like the pictures I wanted it to be special and romantic but all we could see was the very tip of the tower Not worth the extra money and I would have stayed at a different hotel had I known Staff could have been a little bit friendlier as well   The bed was extremely comfortable and the shower was amazing The coffee machine in the room was a bonus for my boyfriend too and apparently made nice coffee
We didn t realise there wasn t a restaurant until we got there  Excellent views from the hotel of the Eiffel Tower nice bathroom and extra comfy bed

No minibar so no fridge No iron so had to pay 7 euro to get a shirt pressed There was a rollaway bed in the room which was not requested took up room The lifts are so small Think there must be a better option  Was 10 minute walk to Eiffel Tower

It would have been better if the staff were a little more familiar with the bar menu and the drinks on offer   The hotel was clean modern with friendly staff Would recommend staying here The bed was very comfortable The coffee machine was a thoughtful touch in the room and replenished daily

Great hotel at a great location This hotel is really worth its money You are a 3 minute walk away of two Metro stations and a short walk of the Champ de Mars park The stuff is also really kind and helpful The only thing which isn t that convenient is that there is no restaurant in the hotel itself But there are plenty of restaurants next door There s also a small Carrefour on the other side of the street which has all you need

Lift is slow The bar only had 3 beers lol so they were gone within a few minutes and were told to serve ourselves by getting the beer out of the fridge behind the bar Over priced for what you get   Location 10 min walk to eiffel tower Clean modern room Room had a great view of the eiffel tower which looked spectacular at night lit up Close to metro

Just a little incovient at the checking in One of the staffs said they were not ready with the room yet ask us to wait and forgot about us there for 40 mins And it was 4pm when we were there how could they didn t have the room ready yet Also it will be better if the room is bigger The size of the room is enough for two but don t feel the luxury feel like good specification standard hotel size room Also we booked for tower view rooms they are right next to the metro and we have been given the first floor So there is not much view of the tower more of watching train passing through Gladly the window is very good to block a lot of noise otherwise it will ruin my trip So try to avoid first floor tower view room if you can it doesn t worth the money   The hotel is excellent Location is really good good for shopping dining and closed to the tube Love the interior and the lounge area Some staffs are really nice and helpful I had a breakfast there one morning the waitress is giving me everything she have in the kitchen I was so stuffed that day

The elevator was a little slow but other wise our stay was great   Everything about this place is great The staff went out of their way to help us We could see the Eiffel Tower from our window just like they said Plenty of cafes and stores on the block even a open air market and to top it off the metro was across the street Even a McDonalds half a block away
N a  I loved the cleanliness of the rooms and the amazing view I enjoyed their breakfast extra charge in their breath taking furnished common area I would definitely come here again

That we had to leave   From the minute we walked in the door we felt very welcome Our room was was very nice the view of the Eiffel Tower was fantastic The area is great only a short walk to the tower Train station located 2 minute Walk away got us quickly to arc de triomphe to train station on departure I would highly recommend this hotel The restaurant next door is Bellissimo

Was told that rooms would be ready at 2 returned to be told one room was ready about 2 30 other room wasn t ready until around 4  Room was lovely and so was hotel we had both rooms facing the effiel tower beautiful view at night Will Defo being returning to this hotel next time visiting paris

Breakfast is expensive but for Paris standards is good value for money you wont have bfast buffet for that price anywhere around Room is a bit small   Good location close to Eiffel tower metro supermarkets and restaurants

The hotel is very close to many of the normal attractions but best of all is surrounded by some great local restaurants and shops On Sunday literally right out the front door the area had a fabulous farmers market with everything you could imagine the fruits vegetables and meats were unbelievable

Maybe a restaurant within the hotel but then loads of restaurants close by spoilt for choice  The staffs were great and friendly Breakfast was very nice and the sauna fantabulous Very close to local transportation and loads of shops and restaurants Definitely going back there

I have requested only one room for me and my wife and my two young childeren and they gave us two rooms It was not clear from the booking that they will give us two rooms the rooms are very small breakfast was not part of the booking plus parking the car was extra the price was very high for such a small hotel

1 Nobody meet we had to park the car in the basement and take the luggage ourselves Just one old man was slowly working 2 They give a room on a 2nd floor where Eiffel Tower top was visible but they was claiming that the room is with the Eiffel view Then he changed the room to the 6 floor where somehow we could partially see Eiffel Tower But from the 4 floor we had to take the luggage to the 6 floor through very narrow stairs There was no lift going to this floor 3 There wasn t minibar and even a fridge 4 There wasn t any phone directory to call the concierge or a reception if there s concierge at all 5 No room service 6 They have charged me 2 parking days each day 25 euros for just 24 hours 7 Definitely not a 4 star hotel Complete cheating   Nothing
If im being honest there wasnt anything i didnt like   This hotel was in a perfect location The rooms are beautiful nice and big and we had a lovely view of the eiffel tower Would def recommend

I would like to have a mini bar fridge in the room   Newly renovated modern quite relatively spacious rooms Very clean Kind staff Location close to attractions Eiffel Tour Orsay Museum Les Invalides etc even on foot Metro station serving 3 lines at 2 walking distance from the hotel

The location is ok but you can hear the train passing just in front Also 120 euros night is a steep price for not having breakfast included   The rooms are spacious by European standards and the cleanliness is excellent The staff is also very friendly

Hotel ONLY serves a buffet breakfast and no other meals which was a bit inconvenient   All staff were more than helpful with any requests we had A very pleasant stay Room was amazing and the Eiffel tower lit up our room at night The room was very well decorated clean and the personal Nespresso machine is a very nice touch Would definitely stay here again

The elevator to the sixth floor where we were staying at was not working so we had to take our luggage up two flights of stairs but they offered everytime to take it up for us We just don t like to be bothersome Very attentive staff   This was a great hotel We were three people My husband My mom and I stayed at the junior suite with Eiffel Tower view It we spectacular Everything renovated All amenities provided and more The view was amazing Very spacious room Specially considering how small the rooms usually are in most places The bathrooms were immaculate and the beds were very comfortable Lots of good places to go eat at right next to it The Eiffel Tower is a short walk and from there we could easily catch the hop on hop off bus Very convenient Clean Friendly and beautiful experience Would definitely come back Thank you so much for everything
Lift not working directly to the room floor and had to use the stairs to get from the 4th floor to the room floor  A room with a view of the Eiffel Tower
The receptionist named hamed   I rate 5 stars beacuse I would like to say thanks for the manager she is controlled as well as help us even in midnight about find good sleep for my children
Hahaha the lift is shaking   So nice staff Location near three metro lines Near Tour Effel Clean room and big space Good breakfast I had a so good experience
the minibar and a champagne in it   the room on the top floor with view on Eiffel is excellent the interior is very stylish As well as having a sanitary kits from L Occitaine fabulous
Excellent location Very close to metro station which is very easy to get around anywhere in Paris Walking distance to Eiffel Tower Good restaurants on the street and are open till late night

Only gripe and its a small one is that the room was very compact but for the location it was in I can t really complain too much  Bed was really comfy and the hotel staff were very friendly catered for my lack of French language skills brilliantly

A glitch handling computer and Internet caused one issue with staff and mostly because I am a foreigner   Very comfortable and safe for a traveler Markets under train two days were great to walk and proximity to Eifl Tower and the view at night was great Restaurants close to hotel were great also
Everything was ok  We love the room with the pettles on the bed as we walked in so lovely the reception from the staff was very good We both feel the french people are warm and welcoming people

the far wall in the room abutted another building I could literally hear the inhabitants having baths talking etc Needs a little more soundproofing in room 41   cosy room ultra clean loved the nespresso coffee machine in the room Staff really helpful and courteous
honestly nothing  the staff was amazing and the location was amazing central to Eiffel tower and easy on the metro to get to all of the prime locations of paris

The smell of the room was almost intoxicating every time we walked into it after a day of being out I think it could be because of the renovation but an air freshner should be introduced or some sort of carpet spray   The hotel has been newly renovated so all facilities are almost new The room we had on level 5 Room 55 was spacious with Eiffel Tower views Also because we were on our honeymoon they had left us a congratulatory card on our table with some mini cupcakes and macarons

Visited here as an early Valantines present for my girlfriend and it did not disappoint The hotel is stylish and modern and in a great part of the city with easy access to anywhere in the city as it is so close to the Eiffel Tower and the metro I would personally reccomend getting a view with the Eiffel Tower as at night it is truly spectacular
The doors and some walls were very thin so you could hear a lot of noise coming from other hotel guests   I liked the look and style of the hotel The beds were very comfortable

Nothing The hotel was perfect   Hotel just been refurbished looks beautiful and in a great location Easy access to shops restaurants and metro Had a lovely view of the Eiffel Tower too and the bed comfort was great
The view of the eiffel tower from where we were was obstructed this was slightly disappointing  The location was central the rooms were newly renovated the staff is friendly
We visited Paris for honeymoon the staff prepare dessert and fruits with a cute decoration for us That was very touching and good view for the Eiffel Tower room 51 Highly recommended

No iron in room there should always be an iron you travel therefore clothes need refreshed Room service option even if basic would be good or a mini bar in room   Modern clean room good coffee machine comfortable bed good shower and good soundproof from metro

Lift is a little small and had a couple of problems with the towels not being cleaned but as soon as mentioned was fixed straight away and very friendly about it  Staff were really friendly and helpful rooms and hotel are really modern and the bathroom is lovely with a nice shower Views of Eiffel Tower were amazing and only a few minutes walk away would recommend to anyone there is also a market right outside on some days which is lovely and lots of Resteraunts near by the choose from
Didn t realise there was a fitness room and sauna until we were about to leave   Staff were extremely friendly and room 63 had a great view of the Eiffel tower

The location of this hotel is ideal 7 minute walk to Eiffel Tower and 2 minute walk to nearest metro The d cor of the rooms was gorgeous and the bathroom and little extras in the bathrooms were really nice detail

We had such a nice stay at Le Parisis The staff were very nice and helpful The location is great Its close to bars restaurants and shops and of course if you get an Eiffel Tower view it makes it that much better We visited the sauna at the end of our night which was really nice and relaxing We did not have breakfast the next morning as we had to be at the airport really early but it looked delicious

Nothing   Very close to the metro Walking distance to many cafes shops sightseeing attractions Higher floors have a view of the Eiffel tower we were on the 4th floor and could see the top 3rd from the window cool to see Staff were fantastic super helpful and friendly Will definitely be back

Bar was not really a bar and there was no one manning it This was especially annoying on NYE when my girlfriend and I were looking forward to a few pre drinks Eiffel Tower view was a little misleading as you could only see the tip of it   Great rooms

If there was a menu for what you could order to your room that would be nice other than that nothing  This hotel was very clean comfortable and stylish the soundproof rooms work a dream the beds are comfortable and the shower is amazing would definitely without doubt stay again and would recommend it to everyone traveling to paris

Hotel has very few or rather no amenities Good view of the Eiffel Tower Booked two rooms One room had a hair dryer dental kit shaving kit The other none of the above Quite funny how difficult it was to get ice even in winter   Convenient location for the Eiffel Tower metro stations and supermarkets Rooms are comfortable Good view of the Eiffel Tower Tip higher floors much better
Na  Nespresso machine all of it The view and room And they followed through with my request for champagne Didn t get a chance to eat there though
this is not really a complaint more a request Being able to AirPrint or print from a mobile device would be an awesome addition   This truly lived up to its rating amazing hotel

The room was a complete let down I paid a lot of money to have a room with a view of the Eiffel Tower as it was a very special occasion Instead I got a very disappointing view of the tip of the tower It is not at all as described in the pictures in reality what you get is a very small room with a perfect view of the Metro line and the supermarket across the street I definitely will not be visiting this hotel again and would never recommend it to anyone travelling to Paris as it is not good value for money I still managed to have a good time in Paris but the hotel almost ruined it In addition to the disappointing view they lacked basic amenities such as an Iron I arrived on a Friday night and there was literally no one in the bar at the Hotel we planned to have a few drinks there but I think the bartender had given up as there was no one there to even serve us drinks   The hotel was really close to the station which was really handy the staff were also friendly and provided recommendations on where to go for food drinks

Right next to the train so we did experience noise of trains rumbling Also we requested a bath but didn t get one We didn t have breakfast because it was very expensive and we thought the room rate was a little pricey   Hotel and rooms very new modern clean well kept The shower was amazing Staff were professional and friendly View of Eiffel Tower from our room Nice toiletries and coffees included

Room was smaller than expected and I had requested 2 single beds but got a double bed Part from that room was clean and shower was awesome  Breakfast was good although we were a bit late so they ran out of juice and bacon p 5 min walk from the Effiel tower

We booked a privilege Eiffel Tower double view room the view was not worth the cost of the room Could barely see the Eiffel Tower Had we have been on a higher floor the view probably would have been OK however we were only on 3rd floor

The first receptionist   I choose this hotel because I wanted to book a room with the Eiffel tower view I reserved a room but they denied my reservation without telling me A few days before the departure I casually checked the reservation and I realized there was no reservation I called the hotel that refused to give any explanation and refused also to give me the room at the same price of my reservation The result was that I had to pay an extra of 100 to have the room I booked 1month before The room in total was 400 euros for 2 night and 2persons Despite the lack of kindness of some members of the stuff the hotel was ok The view of the room was wonderful and unforgettable You could lay on the bed while looking to the Eiffel tower It was very romantic The room was clean they also changed our towels the day after Perfect if you want a romantic week end
Pictures on the website of the view were very accurate Greatest view for what we paid The hotel was a five minute walk from the Eiffel Tower Great neighborhood

I did a surprise weekend away for me and my boyfriend and I was so worried that it wouldn t be nice but I can NOT fault anything we loved every moment of our stay and we loved the fact we was right next to everything seeing as it was our first time in Paris the hotel was so lovely and very clean the staff was very helpful

Sound transmission between rooms plumbing The hotel has an unfortunate name especially evident after the recent Paris terrorist attacks   Large nicely appointed room candies in the lobby are a nice touch

Rooms could do with some coat hooks and newer thicker towels   Lovely room with comfortable bed and great shower Staff were helpful and friendly and access to metro stations was easy and close as was the walk to the Eiffel Tower

Being very close to the tower it also means it is far from most other major attractions   10 min walk to the Eiffel tower and on a Sunday morning there is a great farmers market pop up outside Also very close to two separate tube stations Rooms are very clean and modern with views of the top of the tower Staff are friendly and helpful
Outside street not the best because market with fish smell but on weekends and wednesday only Would be better if had room service  Clean mordern great view of eiffel tower and comfortable
Not a proper reception desk no silver wear or spoons for coffee and there were opened bottles of water in the room when we arrived   The view was super and the bathroom was clean and updated

Got prestige room which was on 6th floor but the lift did not work stairs were too tight room smelled bad for 200 Euros a night one could have found a much better place to stay  It was new spacious lobby location

We booked 1month in advance and on arrival day we have not been accomodated in rooms with Eiffel Tower View Although check in time was specified at 14 00 we could not check in before 14 30 Rooms were not ready cleaned  Location

I hope they will put bigger sign of the hotel name It was so little it was hard to find at night Other than we have no complains   Location is perfect to what we like to see in Paris Staff are excellent to communicate with Yves help us to find a dinner restaurant Hamed help us out to taking care our luggage One more thing I like Le parisis is they worked with their customer when it comes to service We have a 9 30pm flight and we checked out 12pm We dont want our luggage walking with us for 9hrs Le Parisis let our luggage to stay until 5 30 pm when we are ready to leave to go to CDG airport So basically we extend our tour to musee d orsay and it was worth it Definitely we will come back to le parisis

only came across 1 member of staff that was helpful No staff in bar waited 20mins and gave up in end Gym and sauna not open while there Only 2 English speaking channels on TV Still parts of hotel being renovated so was a bit noisy at times   Location great Close to attractions Eiffel Tower 5mins walk and plenty of good places to eat and drink close by Nice rooms very clean and comfortable bed Great shower

The breakfast was expensive and did not offer too much to choose from so the advice is to eat outside there are plenty place around the region When we arrived at 15 00 which was one hour past the check in time our room was not yet ready we had to wait and the front desk person did not even explained initially why we had to wait and after 10 minutes we asked what was taking so long and he in a very rude manner told us to be patient The room did not had an information brochure e g if you need to call to the front desk you need to magically guess that you need to dial 9 I also needed to use an iron which I had to go downstairs to get it because there was no way to know how to call front desk and the receptionist asked me to bring it back after I was done very informal hostel kind of approach so those little perks you expect to get when you go to a 4 star hotel you will not get it from this one   The location was good the shower and bed were very good

Elevator jumps after reaching to the target floor A bigger window would be better   Very close to the Eiffel Tower great view at night when the light is on Many restaurants bars markets within walking distance Complimentary water tea coffee and apples in the room Friendly staff And the shower head is awesome

I booked 2 rooms for Effel tower view but When I arrive hotel with my family hotel staff told that they do not have Eiffel tower view room I felt very bad When I asked hotel what is the purpose of booking in advance They replied that this is my choice now if I want I can go to another hotel I was very angry as I visited 1st time in France Anyway I manage But when I paid the bill they charge the full amount of the room They should charge less as it was given the room without any view When I asked them to give discount as you have not given the room of my choice Hotel staff told me that you write a E mail then they will think to return some amount This is really very bad   I did not like anything in the hotel It is an average hotel not the 4 star category

When we arrived we had to bring our own baggage in and take it to our rooms via the lift that was still being finished and had wires hanging out and loose tiles in the floor No explanation was given for this There is no fridge in the room and consumables weren t restocked each day When I went to book an additional night purely to avoid the hassle of moving our luggage I was quoted a price I could get cheaper on booking com Many times I told the staff that it was my wife s 30th birthday including when booking but nothing was done to make the stay special for her at all Pretty disappointed especially for the price   Mostly new and clean Short walk to the Eiffel Tower

The hotel is classed as a four star but has no facilities to speak of We arrived at about 7 00pm and wanted a drink but were told the bar was not in use The restaurant did service breakfast but that was it If you wanted lunch of evening meal you had to go out Luckily it s in a vicinity that has lots of restaurants Our bedroom was advertised as having a view of the court yard but all we had was a blank wall facing us   The staff were really helpful and couldn t do enough for you with regards to helping you find your way around Paris The hotel bedroom was nice and clean and we had maid service every day

Very close to Eiffel Tower within 10 minute walk privelage room had very nice view of the Eiffel Tower which on the night time looked amazing all lit up sparkling Sunday morning market opposite was lovely to walk through and some lovely fresh pastries for breakfast Hotel staff very friendly and room very spacious
It could be a little cheaper and the view of the eiffel tower is not as I saw from the photos   Nice location friendly and helpful staff great bed awesome bathroom and clean room

We arrived at the hotel on a Sunday and found that our names were not on the arrival list at the lobby Unbeknownst to us we had through our own fault made a booking for the wrong day Monday instead of Sunday Instead of working with us to try to figure out what was going on the man at the lobby immediately told us in the most unpleasant manner that he didn t have our booking After ignoring our repeated requests for the WiFi password so we could look up our booking confirmation email he instructed me very patronisingly to calm down informed us repeatedly that we were wrong and proceeded to give us a condescending lesson in etiquette though we were at no time rude and only confused and understandably alarmed at the thought of possibly not having a reservation In the end a room was available and told us we could have it for which we were grateful though he did it in the most unpleasant combative manner The lift to our 6thfloor room was malfunctioning so we had to lug our luggages up two floors of steps without any offer at all of assistance Our room when we got to it was well appointed with a lovely view but had a strange and mouldy smell A pretty hotel but the welcome we had gotten just left a vile aftertaste   Clean pleasant facilities with great view and convenient facilities

You can hear your neighbour in a room Its a small detail but every time cleaning lady exchanged towels in bathroom she left only shampoo Even though we running out of soap shower gel and lotion we were given shampoo After 4 days spent in this hotel we had 6 bottles of shampoo and no soap and shower gel at all   Really nice hotel newly furnished View on Eiffel tower from your room Perfect location and friendly staff It still in process of reconstruction but on a good way This should be a 5 star hotel Next time in Paris I am staying in this hotel only The money you pay is really worth
The lift was out of order I was on the top floor and had to walk the last floor up after a good day of Work No help offered with my bagage Staff not very helpful   Eiffel tower view
The staff was very kind friendly and helpful hotel room was beautiful we were very impressed I liked the fact that my needs were taken into account when given a room

Unbelievable hotel the view from the bedroom set the tone for the trip Went in a privilege double room and the view is one I ll never forget watching the Eiffel Tower light show from my own bed Very modern hotel and really good price especially for the location right next to metro and Eiffel Tower

I think the rating is false Staff are not helpful at all I had to ask for water to be put in my room everyday of which it was only put on the day we arrived The cleaning staff would leave dirty glasses Ordered wine on the day we arrived and the dirty glasses were still there on check out yet our room was supposedly cleaned daily Totally disgruntled  Nothing

Terrible smell of artificial perfumed room spray gave me an asthma attack We had to open window and door to clear the smell and be able to breathe again Reception area equally poisonous   Location Our bathroom was designed for the disabled so it was very large Comfy beds and pillows Stylish furniture
I was expecting a mini bar in the room Also there was no staff attendance at the bar   Great staff and location Hotel is getting refurbished so really good standards
Everything the staff were friendly and bent over backwards to help breakfast was good and the location was perfect bars and restaurants all around and a 10 min walk from the Eiffel Tower

Asked for an iron and did not get an iron board so had to iron clothes on a table in the room Breakfast was expensive but did not have a lot to choose from  Hotel location is excellent 5 minutes from Eiffel Tower about 200 yards from nearest metro and supermarket The hotel is beautiful very clean comfortable and staff are always happy to help
Danger and unsafty left Poor wifi The room was feeling wet Therefore I was sick next day Very expensive and don t deserve it   Clean room and staff

There is no fridge in the room the elevator is a little strange the breakfast is buffet but there aren t too many choice  the room is small but function well the bed is comfortable and there is a view of the tower

Good breakfast Our room itself was so clean Every were so nice and most of all ver very Honest It shd be a 5 star not 4 star hotel Very safe area and very quiet Our room was on the first floor facing the busy street but did not hear a thing And even though we are on the 1st floor we can still see the top of Eiffel tower 10 mins walk to the tower awesome place

he room still had a bit of a new smell and the electronic window was a little difficult to operate at first   The hotel was very clean and the staff were friendly and helpful In the room we stayed in everything was new and looked very nice The bed was comfortable We enjoyed our stay very much

As always Third trip to paris by family and everytime we chose this hotel Top service and the customer requests are always considered a priority Will highly recommend to anyone who wants to spend a quality time in paris with added benefit of having Eifel Tower within short walking distance

I never saw any British employees which would really have completed the Sherlock Holmes theme at the hotel Depending on which room you are in they can be puzzling to find I suppose that goes with the Sherlock Holmes theme but can be frustrating after a couple cocktails or if you are in a hurry We ended up being moved to another room since ours had some issues which I will explain There seems to be some major differences in rooms that are in the same class We paid for an executive double but the first room we were in was much smaller than the next executive double we were changed to The first room had no room service menu pen paper American plug as advertised and the minibar fridge was frozen shut The room was ice cold and even turning off the thermostat for 5 hours did not change that problem I would have had no idea there was room service available had I not been changed to a different room and seen a menu as it s not advertised on the tv information or anywhere else They may be missing out there   The location is perfect in central London near many sites and shopping galore The property is well situated and presents nicely upon check in with very polite and accommodating staff The bed was comfortable and the rooms are clean The Sherlock Holmes theme was very cool The bar was very nice with very polite staff Drinks were generous and delicious The hotel held our bags after check out so we could get some shopping in before heading back to the country I would definitely stay there again

Not all Executive rooms are the same We stayed here for 3 nights at an Executive Room via Booking com It was in the new wing the room was large quiet street behind and well appointed But the shower cubicle leaked and even after informing reception they were unable to fix it We checked out travelled and booked an Executive room again on Booking com for another four nights This time we were in the old wing and the room was half the size of the Executive Suite in the new wing It was also noisy and we could hear the footsteps of the guest in the adjoining room We asked for a room change for new wing but they said they were full Considering we had just given then 7 room nights the effort could have been a bit keener to put us in the new wing So we didn t feel we got our moneys worth the 2nd time around For guests staying in the new wing and who are carrying large suitcases staff should inform guests that its best to get help with luggage as the corridors to the new wing goes up and down steps and levels and can be arduous especially after a long flight   Location is amazing Close to some great restaurants and cafes bus routes and the tube Can walk to Oxford Street Hotel is clean and staff are pleasant The bar is open throughout the day for hotel guests which was a great plus Would recommend a stay if you can secure an executive suite in the New Wing We snacked a couple of times at the bar and the food was good the receptionists were helpful with hailing cabs and helping with luggage The rooms were cleaned well every day TV had a good range of channels Bathrooms were spacious and clean and good water pressure in the showers New Wing executive suites had a cool remote control to manage lights and blinds
